text.title: Multimodal VUI Design Spec Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for multimodal-vui-design.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the multimodal experience grounded by ASR budget + persona + recovery ladder?

conclusion.verdict: RESTRICT — narrow feature to covered languages
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
